offline.modeLabel: Offline Mode: Showing cached data from

home.subtitle: Your personal health dashboard — all your medical data in one secure place.
home.qrSub: Works without login · Doctors & emergency staff
home.qrHint: Show to doctor or hospital staff for instant access
home.healthNoticeText: Your QR code links to your health profile. Show it to any doctor or hospital staff for instant access. In an emergency anyone can scan it from your phone.
home.scanHint: Scan with any camera app · No login needed

ai.title: AI Health Assistant
ai.poweredBy: Powered by Gemini · Answers based on your health profile
ai.disclaimer: V-Med AI uses your actual health profile for personalised answers. It does not diagnose diseases or prescribe medicines. Always consult your doctor for medical decisions.
ai.q3: Am I taking too many medicines?
ai.q4: Give me a diet plan for my health
ai.q5: What side effects should I watch for?
ai.q6: How can I improve my health?
ai.placeholder: Ask about your medications, health, diet…
ai.footer: Your health data is sent securely. Aadhaar number is never shared.
ai.welcomeMsg:
Hello! I'm your V-Med AI Health Assistant, powered by Gemini.

I have access to your health profile — your medications, visit history, blood group, and more — so my answers are personalised specifically for you.

I can help with:
  • Understanding your medications and side effects
  • Explaining your past diagnoses in plain language
  • Personalised diet and lifestyle tips
  • General health education
I don't diagnose diseases or prescribe medicines. Always consult your doctor for medical decisions.
ai.aiUnavailable: ⚠️ Could not reach AI. Make sure the backend server is running.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDesc: Choose light or dark display. Saved automatically.
settings.emergencyDesc: Shown to doctors and emergency staff when they scan your QR code. Max 3 contacts.
settings.noContactsDesc: Add a contact so doctors can reach your family in an emergency.
settings.vmedIdDesc: Share this ID with doctors for instant profile access
settings.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language for the dashboard.
